title: cyperus diffusus subsp. chalaranthus
intro: Cyperus diffusus subsp. chalaranthus, also known as the small-flowered umbrella sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus diffusus subsp. chalaranthus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
